prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约17968→19205→20607→23707→24833，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约5600名；2025年基准约24833名，后移幅度有所放缓；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年128人、2022年126人、2023年127人、2024年132人、2025年130人；2026年计划129人，较2025年微缩1人，缩招幅度约0.8%，对竞争有轻微加剧作用。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热（2024年），自动化类推荐，管理科学与工程类分化观望；河北省2026年物理类考生约36.5万人，较2025年略增；省控线（本科批）从2024年448分升至2025年459分，竞争环境趋紧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17968 → 19205 → 20607 → 23707 → 24833, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5600 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 24833, with a slowing pace of backward shift; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 128 in 2021, 126 in 2022, 127 in 2023, 132 in 2024, and 130 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 129, a slight reduction of 1 person compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 0.8%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations between 99 and 113 in recent years, overall stable; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 50th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; Transportation Engineering is the university's traditional advantageous discipline (fifth round discipline evaluation A-), directly related to enrollment majors such as Transportation, Maritime Management, and Marine Engineering; Computer, Electronic Information, Automation and other engineering majors, although not rated A, benefit from the overall social popularity of engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other majors continue to be highly popular (2024), Automation recommended, Management Science and Engineering differentiation to be observed; Hebei Province 2026 Physics Category candidates about 365,000, slightly increased from 2025; provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 448 points in 2024 to 459 points in 2025, competition environment tightening.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, slight reduction in 2026 plan, slight increase in local Physics Category candidates, and upward provincial control line, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 24748, range 24248–25248.
